examples.title: Intermediate Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 7C Pattern
examples.code:
# Python implementation for Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 7C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
examples.explanation: Applied engineering pattern showing Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 7C in a structured context.

# Python implementation for Data Engineering Troubleshooting Part 7C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
